name: Butter Pecan Squares
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Hershey's milk chocolate chips, divided
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease an 8 x 8 x 2 inches or 9 x 9 x 2 inches square pan.
3. In a small mixing bowl, cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy. Add the egg and vanilla extract, stirring until combined.
4. Gradually add the flour to the mixture, stirring until well combined.
5. Stir in 1 cup of chocolate chips and 1/2 cup of chopped pecans.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and spread evenly.
7. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes or until lightly browned.
8. Remove from the oven and immediately sprinkle with the remaining 1 cup of chocolate chips, spreading them evenly.
9. Immediately sprinkle with the remaining 1/4 cup of chopped pecans, pressing gently onto the chocolate.
10. Allow to cool completely before cutting into squares.
